====Pokémon==== {{anchor|Persian 2}}{{TrainerPoké |trainer=Nanu |pkmn=Persian |type1=Dark |img=Nanu Persian Adventures.png |epnum=PASM03 |epname=Pokémon Move Specialist Professor Kukui |desc=This {{rf|Alolan}} {{p|Persian}} is Nanu's only known Pokémon. It was first used to battle against Olivia's {{p|Lycanroc}} to test the stage made for an [[Iki Town]] festival. Persian's known moves are {{m|Nasty Plot}} and {{m|Dark Pulse}}.
Persian can also perform the [[Z-Move]] {{m|Black Hole Eclipse}}{{tt|*|mentioned only}}.}}
